name: apolo-dynamic-flow
description: Plugin de orquestacion de agentes para OpenCode. Agnostico al lenguaje (HTML, CSS, JS, React, Rust, C++, PHP, TS, Java, Go). Flujos dinamicos, recoleccion hibrida, planes con 3 modos, tests automaticos, absorcion de tools externas, routing declarativo, atomic writes, file locks, allowlist, secret detection, hash chain, multi-level impact prediction, code quality analysis, test coverage por simbolo, LSP integration.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:python && npm run test:atomic && npm run test:security && npm run test:quality && npm run test
